title: Make Photo Without Editing Portrait Face Realistic
sourceTitle: Make Photo Without Editing Portrait Face Realistic
prompt: Make a photo without editing portrait face, realistic male face, white-pink skin tone, height 180+, slim nose, black hair, head block. Arrange your hair a little. Big fold clothing: oversized black shirt, open chest, open arms. Hand on stainless steel rod, silver watch, small silver necklace, cream casual pants. Soft smile, natural makeup, natural pink lips. Atmosphere: stainless steel rail below with deep blue sea, strong waves, strong wind hitting from front. Posture: standing on stainless steel rod, looking at the camera. Full body drone shot, aspect ratio 3:4.
